basic_details.job_title: BMC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Pharmacist, Librarian and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation (BMC) Pharmacist, Librarian and More Posts Notification 2026 has been released on 27 May 2026 on the official website of BMC under Advertisement No. HO/RGH/3421/Aastha 01 dated 27.05.2026. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the BMC Pharmacist, Librarian and More Posts Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 38 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for backward class candidates (maximum 43 years)

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma/Degree in Pharmacy + Registration + Computer Certificate, Degree/Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology + Experience + Trade Test + Computer Certificate, Graduate + B.Lib/B.L.I.S + Computer Certificate, 12th Pass + GNM Diploma + Nursing Council Registration + Computer Certificate
qualification.details: Pharmacist: Diploma or Degree in Pharmacy from recognized board/university, registered with Maharashtra State Pharmacy Council, and computer certificate (CCC or higher or MS-CIT/GCC-TBC). Blood Bank Technician: Degree or Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology with experience in blood testing, passed trade test, Marathi SSC with 50% marks, and computer certificate. Librarian: Graduate in Arts/Commerce/Science, B.Lib/B.L.I.S from recognized university, library experience preferred, typing knowledge, Marathi SSC with 50% or 100 marks, and computer certificate (CCC or MS-CIT/GCC-TBC). Staff Nurse: 12th (10+2) pass, GNM Diploma (3 or 3.5 years) from recognized board, registered with Maharashtra Nursing Council, Marathi SSC with 50% marks, and computer certificate (CCC or MS-CIT/GCC-TBC).

selection_process: Merit List based on final year marks Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BMC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BMC Various Posts Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation (BMC) Various Contractual Posts is 18th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in BMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for various contractual posts in the Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation (BMC) recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for BMC Various Posts Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to BMC Various Posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for applying to these posts is a minimum of 18 years and a maximum of 38 years, with relaxation for backward class candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Staff Nurse post?
faq.answer: The Staff Nurse post offers a salary of Rs. 30,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required for the Librarian post?
faq.answer: For the Librarian post, candidates need to be a Graduate in Arts/Commerce/Science with a B.Lib/B.L.I.S degree and possess computer knowledge.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for BMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee of Rs. 838/- for both General/OBC and SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these contractual posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves the creation of a merit list based on final year marks, followed by document verification.

faq.question: Q9. Which posts are included in the BMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The recruitment includes posts such as Pharmacist, Blood Bank Technician, Librarian, and Staff Nurse.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for BMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.
